author: alertcat
name: 11L XSA4 + EMA + TTT + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash
blurb: PR #315 baseline (XSA on last 4 layers, EMA decay=0.997) combined with Test-Time Training (3-epoch SGD, lr=0.002, freeze first 2 blocks). TTT adapts model weights to validation distribution at eval time (~47s). First submission combining XSA+EMA+TTT.
